channel.title: Milestone | FORRT - Framework for Open and Reproducible Research Training
channel.copyright: © 2026 - FORRT > Framework for Open and Reproducible Research Training

item.title: Peer Community In joins FORRT's partners
item.description:
FORRT has added Peer Community In (PCI) and the Peer Community Journal to its network of partners. PCI offers thematic platforms to review preprints, and PCJ is a multidisciplinary, indexed, diamond open-access journal where validated preprints can be published free of charge for authors.

See our partners
